steps.title: Substitute w = 12 into the equation
steps.content:
The equation $d = 31w + 90$ gives total savings $d$ after $w$ weeks. To find the total savings in 12 weeks, we substitute $w = 12$:
$$d = 31(12) + 90$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression:
$$d = 372 + 90 = 462$$
This matches - B is correct.
